description: Hunter and Bobbi find Elena's cousin dumping stolen weapons and are confronted by the police, only to discover that one officer is an Inhuman who paralyzes them with his gaze. The cousin is killed as a message, and Bobbi and Hunter are taken into custody. The rest of the team learns about the incident and reassesses Elena's intentions.

transcript.line: Found him. He was dumping weapons into the river.
She's telling the truth.
We've got visitors. Local law enforcement.
Okay, well, be careful. Not everyone's on this side of the law. We're on our way.
Stay with him?
What's going on here?
We've got this. World Health Organization jurisdiction.
You don't really expect me to just drive away, do you?
Guess not. It would've been easier if you had.
Hunter and Bobbi were gone by the time we got there.
Elena's cousin. The police just left him there.
I need to tell Coulson what's going on.
I haven't seen a lot of dead bodies, but is that normal?
No, it's too soon for rigor mortis to set in, but, maybe they have another kind of weapon.
An Inhuman?
I don't see how Bobbi and Hunter were taken otherwise.
Elena has been asking about him.
I'm sorry.
Hunter? Are you okay?
It hurts.
Yeah. Pain means it's wearing off.
Ugh. Bloody powers.
Good afternoon, beautiful. I need you to answer questions. His fate depends on your answers. Why are you really here?
